name: JoAi: Create Blueprint

description.en: Create a reusable automation blueprint that your agent can execute to carry out complex multi-step tasks.
description.de: Erstelle einen wiederverwendbaren Automatisierungs-Blueprint, den dein Agent ausführen kann, um komplexe mehrstufige Aufgaben zu erledigen.
description.es: Create a reusable automation blueprint that your agent can execute to carry out complex multi-step tasks.
description.fr: Create a reusable automation blueprint that your agent can execute to carry out complex multi-step tasks.
description.ro: Create a reusable automation blueprint that your agent can execute to carry out complex multi-step tasks.
description.it: Create a reusable automation blueprint that your agent can execute to carry out complex multi-step tasks.

bot: Use this when the user wants to define a new repeatable automation or workflow for their agent. Help them structure it clearly.

inputs.name: Name

description.en: A short name for this blueprint
description.de: Ein kurzer Name für diesen Blueprint
description.es: A short name for this blueprint
description.fr: A short name for this blueprint
description.ro: A short name for this blueprint
description.it: A short name for this blueprint

inputs.bot: A concise name describing what this blueprint does (e.g., 'Weekly report', 'Onboard new client').

inputs.name: Description

description.en: What this blueprint does and when to use it
description.de: Was dieser Blueprint tut und wann er eingesetzt wird
description.es: What this blueprint does and when to use it
description.fr: What this blueprint does and when to use it
description.ro: What this blueprint does and when to use it
description.it: What this blueprint does and when to use it

inputs.bot: A short explanation of this blueprint's purpose and when the agent should run it.

inputs.name: Agent ID

description.en: The agent this blueprint belongs to
description.de: Der Agent, zu dem dieser Blueprint gehört
description.es: The agent this blueprint belongs to
description.fr: The agent this blueprint belongs to
description.ro: The agent this blueprint belongs to
description.it: The agent this blueprint belongs to

inputs.bot: The agent hash ID that owns this blueprint.

inputs.name: Config

description.en: Configuration or steps for this blueprint (JSON or text)
description.de: Konfiguration oder Schritte für diesen Blueprint (JSON oder Text)
description.es: Configuration or steps for this blueprint (JSON or text)
description.fr: Configuration or steps for this blueprint (JSON or text)
description.ro: Configuration or steps for this blueprint (JSON or text)
description.it: Configuration or steps for this blueprint (JSON or text)

inputs.bot: Optional structured configuration, steps, or instructions that define how this blueprint runs.
